title: BBA retail Management & Digital Marketing
content: BBA in Retail Management & Digital Marketing Department of Retail Management Programme Level Under Graduate Duration 3 Years About the Programme Eligibility Fee Structure About the Programme Eligibility XII with minimum 50% Marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list Fee Structure Duration 3 Years Tuition Fee (per annum) 1,20,000 Exam Fee (per annum) 20,000 Medical Insurance (Per Annum) 650 Caution Money (One Time Payment ) 2000 Student ID Card 1000 IMPORTANT LINKS Virtual Tour Blogs Admission Procedure Financial Aid & Loan Facilities Hostel Placements Download Brochure Admission Documents & Undertaking Apply Now XII with minimum 50% Marks Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list APPLY NOW
